issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for deployment and API usage.

scenarios.name: Self-host Plausible CE with docker-compose
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses ghcr.io/plausible/community-edition:v2 with both Postgres and ClickHouse services, sets BASE_URL/DATABASE_URL/CLICKHOUSE_DATABASE_URL, and generates SECRET_KEY_BASE via openssl rand -base64 48; baseline forgets ClickHouse or invents an unofficial image.

scenarios.name: Stats API realtime visitors and top 10 pages
scenarios.rationale: Treatment hits /api/v1/stats/realtime/visitors and /api/v1/stats/breakdown with property=event:page using Bearer auth and site_id/period/metrics params; baseline guesses endpoint paths and misses the breakdown property semantics.
